title: IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website [IIT Hyderabad Website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 35 years who have a Post-graduation/Master’s degree in any discipline with relevant experience are eligible to apply for this Alumni Relations Manager post. The online application process for IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 has started on 13 May 2026 and will rema

qualification.details: Post-graduation/Master’s degree in any discipline with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years experience in: a. Alumni engagement and relationship management b. Organizing alumni reunions, campus visits c. Fundraising coordination d. Maintaining alumni databases e. Liaising with stakeholders

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Alumni Relations Manager post at IIT Hyderabad is 03 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post-graduation/Master’s degree in any discipline with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Alumni Relations Manager role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of experience in alumni engagement, relationship management, organizing events, fundraising, database maintenance, and stakeholder liaison is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Alumni Relations Manager position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Alumni Relations Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIT Hyderabad website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, Skill Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Alumni Relations Manager.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Alumni Relations Manager is on a contractual basis.
